commands.review_summary:
This PR moves Active Memory toggles, Nostr bus/profile state, Phone Control arm state, and Microsoft Teams feedback learnings from legacy JSON files to plugin keyed state with updated tests.

PR surface: Source +136, Tests +104. Total +240 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection reproduces the review concerns: the PR opens Phone Control state under `armed` while current migration docs specify `arm-state`, and the diff adds runtime JSON import/delete paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review should decide the migration boundary and Phone Control namespace contract before any automated repair or merge path.

target.title: refactor: move plugin state slices to sqlite
target.body:
## Summary

- Move four plugin-owned JSON state slices onto plugin keyed state: Active Memory session toggles, Nostr bus/profile state, Phone Control arm state, and MS Teams feedback reflection learnings.
- Import existing legacy JSON state on first read/write, remove the legacy files after import, and keep runtime writes on the plugin-state store.
- Update tests to use plugin-state runtime stores and cover the Active Memory multi-session legacy import regression.

## Notes

This intentionally avoids session files and avoids larger sync/service-seam rewrites such as Discord thread bindings or ACPX process leases; those need separate API shape work rather than a mechanical keyed-store swap.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write extensions/nostr/src/nostr-state-store.ts extensions/nostr/src/nostr-state-store.test.ts extensions/active-memory/index.ts extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/feedback-reflection-store.ts extensions/msteams/src/feedback-reflection.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/nostr/src/nostr-state-store.test.ts extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/feedback-reflection.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/msteams/src/feedback-reflection.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/nostr/src/nostr-state-store.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean for this patch; ignored three unrelated current-main findings outside this branch.
target.author: steipete
